title: A Google employee allegedly used inside information to win $1.2 million on Polymarket
summary: Federal prosecutors have charged Google employee Michele Spagnuolo with commodities fraud and money laundering for making $1.2 million on Polymarket using confidential Google data about search trends. He was arrested in New York and released on a $2.25 million bond.
content:
Federal prosecutors charged a Google employee with fraud after he allegedly made $1.2 million on Polymarket bets related to Search-related trends in 2025, as reported earlier by ABC News. In their now-unsealed complaint, prosecutors allege that Michele Spagnuolo "knew the outcome of these wagers before the trading public did because he had accessed Google's confidential, commercially valuable internal data." Spagnuolo was arrested in New York on Wednesday but released on a $2.25 million bond, ABC News reports. He is charged with commodities fraud, wire fraud, and money laundering.
Spagnuolo made bets on Polymarket under the username AlphaRa …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 谷歌员工涉嫌利用内幕信息在Polymarket上赢取120万美元
zh.summary: 联邦检察官指控谷歌员工Michele Spagnuolo利用谷歌关于搜索趋势的机密数据在Polymarket上赚取120万美元，涉嫌商品欺诈和洗钱。他在纽约被逮捕，并以225万美元的保释金获释。

title: Rivian will deliver the first R2 SUVs on June 9
summary: Rivian announced June 9 as the delivery date for its first R2 SUVs, which CEO RJ Scaringe called "maybe the most important thing" the company has launched. The date marks a critical milestone in Rivian's expansion into affordable mass-market EVs.
content: The company has finally set a date for the first customer deliveries of what CEO RJ Scaringe has said is "maybe the most important thing we’ve launched to date."

zh.title: Rivian将于6月9日交付首批R2 SUV
zh.summary: Rivian宣布6月9日为其首批R2 SUV的交付日期，首席执行官RJ Scaringe称其为公司推出的"可能最重要的事情"。这个日期标志着Rivian进军价格亲民的大众EV市场的一个关键里程碑。

title: Triomics nabs $22M to bring oncology-specific AI to cancer centers
summary: Triomics has raised $22 million in Series B funding led by Battery Ventures to expand its oncology-focused AI platform for cancer centers. The capital will accelerate deployment of AI tools designed specifically for cancer treatment and research.
content: The Series B round was led by Battery Ventures.

zh.title: Triomics获得2200万美元融资，为癌症中心引入肿瘤学专用AI
zh.summary: Triomics完成由Battery Ventures领导的2200万美元B轮融资，以扩展其面向癌症中心的肿瘤学专用AI平台。这笔资金将加速为癌症治疗和研究量身定制的AI工具的部署。

title: California defeats Tesla's attempt to throw out racial discrimination lawsuit
summary: California's civil rights agency has successfully blocked Tesla's attempt to dismiss a racial discrimination lawsuit, with trial expected in July. The ruling represents a significant legal victory for the state's employment discrimination case against the automaker.
content: California civil rights agency hails win over Tesla, anticipates trial in July.

zh.title: 加州击败特斯拉驳回种族歧视诉讼的企图
zh.summary: 加州民权机构成功阻止了特斯拉驳回种族歧视诉讼的企图，审判预计在7月进行。该裁定对该州对汽车制造商的就业歧视案件来说是一个重大法律胜利。

title: Apple’s newest iPad Air is up to $100 off for the first time
summary: Apple's latest iPad Air models are receiving their first substantial price reductions, with the 13-inch variant dropping $100 to $699.99. The discounts make the M4-powered tablets a more compelling value compared to entry-level iPad options.
content:
If you want an iPad that’s more powerful than the entry-level model but less expensive than the iPad Pro, the latest iPad Air is the one to buy, and it’s down to one its best prices to date. The 11-inch Air with 128GB of storage and Wi-Fi connectivity is available at Amazon starting at $519.99 ($79 off). If you want a larger screen, the base 13-inch Air has dropped to a new low price of $699 ($100 off), also at Amazon.
13-inch iPad Air M4 

Where to Buy:

 $799 $699.99 at Amazon (128GB, Wi-Fi)
 $899 $789.99 at Amazon (256GB, Wi-Fi)
 $1099 $1019 at Amazon (512GB, Wi-Fi)


11-inch iPad Air (2026)

Where to Buy:

 $599 $519.99 at Amazon (128GB, Wi-Fi)
 $699 $609.99 at Amazon (256GB, Wi-Fi)
 $899 $839 at Amazon (512GB, Wi-Fi)

No matter which size you choose, the new iPad Air is noticeably faster than the base iPad thanks to its M4 processor and a bump up to 12GB of RAM. While it falls short of the M5-powered iPad Pros in terms of raw performance and its super-thin design, the Air is sufficient for lighter creative work and some gaming. This model also boasts Apple Intelligence and support for the latest Apple Pencil Pro. 
Apple also made a handful of smaller upgrades in the now-discounted iPad Air, like the N1 wireless networking chip that supports Wi-Fi 7 and Bluetooth 6. It’s also compatible with Thread, making it easier to control smart lights, locks, and other compatible smart home devices directly from your tablet. It was already a good value, and now it’s a better one at this price if you’re shopping for a new iPad.
Read our M4-powered iPad Air review.

zh.title: 苹果最新iPad Air首次降价，最高优惠100美元
zh.summary: 苹果最新款iPad Air平板电脑首次大幅降价，其中13英寸机型降价100美元至699.99美元。这些折扣使搭载M4芯片的平板电脑相比入门级iPad选项更具吸引力。

title: Websites have a new way to spy on visitors: analyzing their SSD activity
summary: Security researchers have discovered that websites can use JavaScript to measure and analyze visitor SSD activity, revealing a new privacy vulnerability. The technique allows sites to gather user information without explicit consent or knowledge.
content: Telltale SSD activity can be measured in the browser using simple JavaScript.

zh.title: 网站有了新方法窥探访客：分析其SSD活动
zh.summary: 安全研究人员发现网站可以使用JavaScript来测量和分析访客的SSD活动，暴露了一个新的隐私漏洞。该技术允许网站在没有明确同意或知情的情况下收集用户信息。

title: Mystery GPS jammer in Iran becomes test for NASA satellites’ capabilities
summary: A mysterious GPS jammer operating in Iran is serving as an inadvertent test of NASA's science satellites' ability to detect interference sources. The incident demonstrates the dual-use potential of NASA's satellite technology for non-traditional applications.
content: NASA science satellites show dual use in locating sources of GPS interference.

zh.title: 伊朗神秘GPS干扰器成为NASA卫星能力的测试
zh.summary: 一个在伊朗运营的神秘GPS干扰器无意中成为了NASA科学卫星探测干扰源能力的测试。这一事件展示了NASA卫星技术在非传统应用中的双重用途潜力。

title: All the news about Ferrari’s polarizing Luce EV
summary: Ferrari's new Luce EV, a four-door electric sedan co-designed with Jony Ive, has generated polarized reactions and coincided with the company's stock price decline. The vehicle's radical departure from Ferrari's traditional aesthetic has disappointed some brand loyalists.
content:
Ferrari fans don’t like the design of the new Luce EV, an electric four-door sedan that just doesn’t look like the Ferraris of old.
It was designed with help from Jony Ive’s LoveFrom, but what worked for Ive at Apple isn’t working for Ferrari. The Luce’s launch immediately preceded a stock drop that even an appearance by the Pope hasn’t been able to turn around so far.


					
Lamborghini CEO talks EVs vs. hybrids after the Ferrari Luce launch.
			
This Ferrari should have been a Volkswagen
			
Luce x Leo.
			
‘If I were to say what I think, I would be hurting Ferrari.’
			
Ferrari’s stock plummets after disappointing Luce unveil.
			
Jony Ive’s Ferrari looks nothing like a Ferrari
			
Ferrari reveals its first EV, with design help from Jony Ive
			
Here’s what the Ferrari Luce’s buttons, switches, and knobs sound like.
			
Ferrari’s first EV will have an interior designed by Jony Ive
			
Ferrari exposes the guts of its upcoming 1000hp EV
			
Ferrari’s first EV spotted making fake Ferrari sounds.

zh.title: 法拉利备受争议的Luce电动车新闻汇总
zh.summary: 法拉利新推出的Luce电动车是一款与乔尼·艾弗联合设计的四门电动轿车，引发了两极分化的反应，并伴随公司股价下跌。这款车与法拉利传统美学的激进背离令一些品牌忠诚粉丝感到失望。

title: Mina the Hollower is the best old-school action adventure I've played in a while
summary: Mina the Hollower delivers an engaging throwback experience combining smooth movement mechanics, compelling combat, and extensive hidden secrets. The game stands out as an innovative reimagining of classic action-adventure gameplay.
content: Smooth movement, compelling combat, and tons of secrets make for an innovative throwback.

zh.title: Mina the Hollower是我最近玩过最好的怀旧动作冒险游戏
zh.summary: Mina the Hollower提供了一种引人入胜的怀旧体验，融合了流畅的移动机制、令人信服的战斗和丰富的隐藏秘密。该游戏作为经典动作冒险游戏的创新重塑而备受瞩目。

title: In more good news for Amazon, Snowflake signs $6B deal with AWS for AI CPU chips
summary: Snowflake has signed a five-year, $6 billion deal with Amazon Web Services for AI processors, reducing its dependence on Nvidia chips. The agreement reflects accelerating competition in the AI processor market and AWS's push into chip manufacturing.
content: Snowflake has signed a new, enormous five-year deal with Amazon to secure chips for AI usage. Nvidia is once again being put on notice.

zh.title: 对亚马逊而言更是好消息，Snowflake与AWS签署60亿美元AI芯片交易
zh.summary: Snowflake与亚马逊网络服务公司签署了为期五年、价值60亿美元的人工智能处理器协议，减少了对英伟达芯片的依赖。该协议反映了AI处理器市场的加速竞争和AWS在芯片制造领域的推进。

title: The new Halide camera app launches with film looks and an upgraded photo editor
summary: Lux Optics has released Halide Mark III featuring a new film simulation engine with five cinematic looks developed alongside a Hollywood colorist. The premium app ($59.99 one-time) brings professional photography tools to iPhone and iPad users.
content:
Halide Mark III isn’t free, but you can try it out for a week before buying. | Image: Lux Optics	

After first being announced in December 2024, Lux Optics has finally released the latest version of its Halide camera app for the iPhone and iPad. The Halide Mark III app's most compelling feature is a new film simulation engine and a collection of five new Looks that can be applied to photos as they're taken. Co-developed with Cullen Kelly, a "renowned Hollywood colorist," the different looks are tailored for landscape photography, portraits, and cityscapes, plus a black-and-white option with extra film grain.
Halide Mark III is available now through the App Store for a one-time purchase price of $59.99, or as part of a $19.99/year subscri …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 新款Halide相机应用推出胶片效果和升级的照片编辑器
zh.summary: Lux Optics发布了Halide Mark III，该应用采用新的胶片模拟引擎，具有与好莱坞调色师合作开发的五种电影感效果。这款高级应用（一次性支付59.99美元）为iPhone和iPad用户带来了专业摄影工具。

title: Facebook launches a ‘Plus’ subscription that gives you extra features
summary: Meta is globally rolling out Plus subscription tiers for Facebook, Instagram, and WhatsApp ($3.99, $3.99, and $2.99 monthly) while testing AI subscriptions. The strategy reflects Meta's effort to diversify revenue streams beyond advertising following major AI investments.
content:
After announcing tests of premium subscriptions for Facebook, Instagram, WhatsApp earlier this year, TechCrunch and Bloomberg report that Meta is launching a global rollout over the next few weeks and is also starting to test subscriptions for Meta AI. With the new offerings, Meta joins many other tech companies in changing up its subscription plans to bring in new revenues following substantial AI investments - Google, for example, recently lowered the price of its most expensive subscription and threw in YouTube Premium.
Instagram Plus and Facebook Plus will cost $3.99 per month, while WhatsApp Plus will cost $2.99 per month. Instagram Pl …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Facebook推出"Plus"订阅服务，为用户提供额外功能
zh.summary: Meta正在全球范围内为Facebook、Instagram和WhatsApp推出Plus订阅层级（月费分别为3.99美元、3.99美元和2.99美元），同时测试AI订阅服务。该策略反映了Meta在进行大规模AI投资后，努力实现收入多元化，减少对广告的依赖。

title: Nvidia bets $150B on Taiwan as Trump's plan to make US an AI hub backfires
summary: Nvidia is investing $150 billion annually in Taiwan to establish it as a global AI "epicenter," signaling confidence in Taiwan's strategic importance over U.S.-based alternatives. The decision undercuts recent U.S. government efforts to build domestic AI infrastructure.
content: Nvidia will invest $150 billion a year to make Taiwan an AI “epicenter.”

zh.title: 英伟达投入1500亿美元赌台湾，特朗普的美国AI中心计划适得其反
zh.summary: 英伟达每年在台湾投入1500亿美元，以建立其作为全球AI"中心"的地位，这表明其对台湾战略重要性的信心超过美国国内的替代方案。这一决定削弱了美国政府最近为建立国内AI基础设施所做的努力。

title: Payroll startup Remote says it grew revenue 50% per employee without adding headcount
summary: Payroll provider Remote has surpassed $300 million in annual recurring revenue and achieved cash-flow positivity by growing revenue per employee 50% through AI adoption. The milestone demonstrates how AI can improve operational efficiency without increasing headcount.
content: Payroll service provider Remote recently surpassed $300 million in annual recurring revenue (ARR) and became cash-flow positive, thanks to a 50% increase in revenue per employee resulting from AI adoption.

zh.title: 薪资初创公司Remote称在不增加员工数量的情况下实现了50%的人均收入增长
zh.summary: 薪资提供商Remote已超过3亿美元的年度经常性收入，并通过AI采用实现了人均收入增长50%，达到现金流正值。这一里程碑表明AI如何在不增加员工人数的情况下改进运营效率。

title: Roku OS’s home screen now features a large, permanent ad
summary: Roku has added a permanent advertisement to its operating system's home screen, continuing the platform's shift toward direct-to-consumer advertising monetization.
content: “I don't want recommendations! I know what I want to watch."

zh.title: Roku OS主屏幕现在展示大型永久广告
zh.summary: Roku已在其操作系统主屏幕上添加永久广告，继续推进该平台向直接面向消费者的广告变现转变。

title: Roids were all the rage at the Enhanced Games
summary: The inaugural Enhanced Games in Las Vegas allowed athletes using performance-enhancing drugs to compete, with swimming champion Cody Miller winning $250,000 in the men's 50m breaststroke. The event raises questions about banned substances and equipment in athletic performance.
content:
Cody Miller just after winning $250,000 at the Enhanced Games.	

In Las Vegas, the blazing sun beats down on a makeshift Olympic-length pool. Cody Miller stands on the starting block of lane one. His arms are raised in victory. MC Hammer's "U Can't Touch This" thumps over the loudspeakers as he rips off his swimming cap, throwing it to the ground. Miller lets out a guttural scream, muscles and veins bulging. He's just won the men's 50m breaststroke at the inaugural Enhanced Games. Miller's wallet is $250,000 fatter than it was 26.55 seconds ago - a new personal best time for the two-time Olympic medalist.
Is Miller's win thanks to his polyurethane swimsuit, which was banned after the 2008 Olympics as a f …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 增强游戏中的类固醇大受欢迎
zh.summary: 首届在拉斯维加斯举办的增强游戏允许使用性能增强药物的运动员参赛，游泳冠军柯迪·米勒在男子50米蛙泳项目中赢得了25万美元。该赛事引发了关于运动成绩中禁用物质和器材的疑问。

title: Valve's Steam Deck is back in stock after months, but you won't like it
summary: Valve's Steam Deck has returned to stock availability after months of shortages, but at a significantly elevated price reflecting current market conditions. The portable gaming device originally launched at $399.
content: Four-year-old handheld is saddled with an unfortunately modern price tag.

zh.title: Valve的Steam Deck重新上市，但你可能不会满意
zh.summary: 经过数月缺货后，Valve的Steam Deck已重新上市，但价格大幅上升，反映了当前市场状况。这款便携式游戏设备原价为399美元。

title: Trump admin to block Ebola-exposed Americans from US, move them to Kenya
summary: The Trump administration announced plans to block Americans exposed to Ebola from entering the US and relocate them to Kenya instead. The CDC was requested to provide staff for screening travelers at airports.
content: Trump official asked CDC staff to volunteer to screen travelers at airports.

zh.title: 特朗普政府将阻止暴露于埃博拉病毒的美国人进入美国，将他们转移到肯尼亚
zh.summary: 特朗普政府宣布计划阻止暴露于埃博拉病毒的美国人进入美国，并将他们转移到肯尼亚。疾病控制中心被要求在机场为旅客筛查人员提供支持。

title: "Little red dot" in early Universe is a naked supermassive black hole
summary: Astronomers have identified a supermassive black hole in the early universe that accounts for over two-thirds of its host object's total mass. The discovery offers new insights into the formation and prevalence of supermassive black holes in ancient galaxies.
content: The black hole accounts for over two-thirds the mass of the object it inhabits.

zh.title: 早期宇宙中的"红色小点"是一个裸露的超大质量黑洞
zh.summary: 天文学家在早期宇宙中发现了一个超大质量黑洞，其质量占其宿主天体总质量的三分之二以上。这一发现为超大质量黑洞在古代星系中的形成和普遍程度提供了新的见解。

title: UK Visa Portal exposed thousands of applicants’ passports and selfies — then called the lawyers on us
summary: A third-party UK visa application website exposed sensitive documents including passports, selfies, and location data of thousands of applicants. Rather than fixing the security flaw, the company responded by sending legal threats to the researcher who discovered the vulnerability.
content: The third-party website exposed passports, selfies, and the location data of applicants who submitted their documents as part of the U.K. visa application process. Instead of fixing the issue, the website sent attorneys.

zh.title: 英国签证门户暴露了数千申请者的护照和自拍照——随后对举报人提起诉讼
zh.summary: 第三方英国签证申请网站暴露了数千申请人的护照、自拍照和位置数据等敏感文件。该公司没有修复安全漏洞，反而对发现该漏洞的研究人员发送了法律威胁。

title: US Space Force confirms SpaceX will build sensor-to-shooter targeting network
summary: The U.S. Space Force confirmed SpaceX as the contractor to develop a military targeting network that converts sensor data into real-time weapons targeting. The military emphasized the system must deliver both speed and scale without compromise.
content: "We aren’t trading speed for scale; we are demanding both," says the military's program manager.

zh.title: 美国太空军确认SpaceX将建造传感器到射手的瞄准网络
zh.summary: 美国太空军确认SpaceX为承包商，开发一个军事瞄准网络，将传感器数据转换为实时武器瞄准。军方强调该系统必须在不做任何妥协的情况下同时提供速度和规模。

title: Meta launches Instagram, Facebook, and WhatsApp subscriptions, with more to come, including AI plans
summary: Meta is rolling out paid subscription tiers across Instagram, Facebook, and WhatsApp globally while testing new AI-powered features and creator tools under its "Meta One" subscription umbrella. The move diversifies Meta's revenue strategy beyond advertising.
content: Meta is rolling out paid subscription plans for Instagram, Facebook, and WhatsApp worldwide, while also testing new AI, creator, and business-focused offerings under its broader “Meta One” subscription brand.

zh.title: Meta推出Instagram、Facebook和WhatsApp订阅服务，更多服务即将推出，包括人工智能计划
zh.summary: Meta在全球范围内推出Instagram、Facebook和WhatsApp的付费订阅层级，同时在"Meta One"订阅框架下测试新的人工智能功能和创作者工具。此举使Meta的收入策略多样化，扩展到广告之外。

title: With a new $100M raise, Princeton’s Thea Energy is now a top-funded fusion startup
summary: Princeton-based fusion startup Thea Energy has raised $100 million in new funding, securing its position among the most well-funded fusion companies. The company's innovative magnet technology could accelerate its timeline to commercialize a power plant by 2034.
content: Thea Energy's pixel-inspired magnets could give its power plant plans a boost. The fusion startup hopes to get a commercial reactor working by 2034.

zh.title: 普林斯顿Thea Energy融资1亿美元，成为资金最充足的核聚变初创公司之一
zh.summary: 普林斯顿核聚变初创公司Thea Energy融资1亿美元，巩固了其在资金最充足核聚变公司中的地位。该公司创新的磁铁技术可能会加快其到2034年商业化发电站的时间表。

title: Disclosure Day final trailer features Spielberg himself
summary: The final trailer for "Disclosure Day" features Director Steven Spielberg discussing how his personal views on extraterrestrial life have evolved. The trailer intersperses Spielberg's commentary with footage from the film.
content: Director describes how his views on existence of aliens have changed, interspersed with footage from film.

zh.title: 《真相大白日》最终预告片中出现斯皮尔伯格本人
zh.summary: 《真相大白日》最终预告片中，导演史蒂文·斯皮尔伯格讨论了他对外星生命的个人观点如何演变。预告片将斯皮尔伯格的评论与电影片段穿插在一起。

title: YouTube to begin automatically labeling AI videos
summary: YouTube will automatically label videos created with AI tools to help viewers identify synthetic content. However, minimally AI-generated, animated, or unrealistic videos may still evade detection and labeling.
content: AI videos that are animated, unrealistic, or only have a little AI may still hide their origins, though.

zh.title: YouTube将开始自动标记AI生成的视频
zh.summary: YouTube将自动标记使用AI工具创建的视频，帮助观众识别合成内容。但是，最少化使用AI生成、动画或不现实的视频仍可能逃避检测和标记。

title: Valve raises Steam Deck prices by more than $200
summary: Valve has significantly increased Steam Deck pricing, with the 512GB OLED model rising from $549 to $789 and the 1TB model from $649 to $949, citing rising memory and storage costs. Both models are now in stock with 3-5 business day delivery.
content:
Valve has significantly increased the price of the Steam Deck - but now, it's also in stock. The 512GB Steam Deck OLED now costs $789, up from $549, while the 1TB model costs $949, up from $649. As I write this, both models are available to buy on Steam with an estimated delivery date of three to five business days.
The company says the price increase is because of "rising memory and storage costs." Nothing about the Steam Deck has changed, but "these new prices reflect the current state of component costs and other global logistical challenges across the industry as a whole. We'll keep you updated if anything changes."
Some refurbished St …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Valve上调Steam Deck价格超过200美元
zh.summary: Valve大幅提高了Steam Deck的价格，512GB OLED型号从549美元上升到789美元，1TB型号从649美元上升到949美元，原因是存储和内存成本上升。两款型号现已有货，交货时间为3-5个工作日。

title: Smart light company Govee apologizes for “white supremacy” marketing imagery
summary: Smart light company Govee apologized for using offensive marketing imagery that referenced white supremacy in a recent campaign. A company PR executive stated the campaign "did not meet the standard required."
content: PR exec says Govee "did not meet the standard required."

zh.title: 智能灯公司Govee为"白人至上主义"营销图像道歉
zh.summary: 智能灯公司Govee为在近期活动中使用包含白人至上主义内容的冒犯性营销图像而道歉。公司公关主管表示该活动"未达到所需标准"。

title: The Verge’s 2026 college graduation gift guide
summary: The Verge has compiled a comprehensive graduation gift guide featuring practical items designed to help new college graduates navigate their transition to post-college life. The curated selection includes both celebratory gifts and tools for moving, job hunting, and independent living.
content:
Graduating from college is exciting, but it can also feel slightly terrifying. Along with celebrating a huge accomplishment, many grads jump right into looking for a job. Some might be getting their first apartment, too, which brings on a whole new set of responsibilities. That's why getting the right graduation gift is so important: They aren't merely celebratory, they can make these huge transitions feel a little less overwhelming.
We've curated dozens of gift ideas that celebrate their accomplishment and prepare them for life after college. Some of our picks are practical, meant to make adulting less daunting, including clothes steamers  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: The Verge 2026年大学毕业礼物指南
zh.summary: The Verge编制了一份全面的毕业礼物指南，包含实用物品，旨在帮助大学毕业生顺利过渡到大学后的生活。精选的物品包括庆祝礼物和搬家、求职和独立生活的工具。

title: CrowdStrike and Google take down botnet used by hackers to target software developers in supply chain attacks
summary: CrowdStrike and Google have dismantled the Glassworm botnet, which attackers used to inject malware into open-source software projects and compromise developers and their organizations. The takedown addresses a significant supply chain security threat in the software ecosystem.
content: Cybercriminals used the Glassworm botnet to infect open source software projects with malware, and in turn hack the developers and companies that use that software.

zh.title: CrowdStrike和Google摧毁黑客用于供应链攻击的僵尸网络
zh.summary: CrowdStrike和Google已经破坏了Glassworm僵尸网络,该网络被攻击者用来向开源软件项目注入恶意软件,并危及开发者及其组织。此次行动解决了软件生态系统中一个重大的供应链安全威胁。

title: You can print, slice, and engrave using this desktop crafting machine
summary: xTool has introduced the M2 Color Craft Laser, an affordable modular crafting machine that can print, cut, and engrave on paper, wood, felt, and metal. The machine's upgradeable design allows users to swap components for various creative and commercial applications like starting an Etsy shop.
content:
Upgrading to more power laser cutting tools expands the types of materials the M2 can engrave. | Image: xTool	

xTool has announced a new multi-purpose crafting machine that could potentially be one of the most affordable ways to start an Etsy shop. Its modular design facilitates a CMYK print head that works on multiple materials including paper, wood, and felt. It can later be swapped with laser-based cutting and engraving tools. You can use the M2 to both print and cut stickers, for example, but it's versatile enough to also be used to etch designs onto metal water bottles. The machine's upgradeable functionality justifies its footprint, which is much larger than your typical desktop printer.
The xTool M2 Color Craft Laser, which will be priced at  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 使用这台台式工艺机器可以打印、切割和雕刻
zh.summary: xTool推出了M2彩色工艺激光机,这是一款负担得起的模块化工艺机器,可以在纸张、木材、毛毡和金属上进行打印、切割和雕刻。该机器的可升级设计使用户可以交换组件,用于各种创意和商业应用,如开设Etsy商店。

title: Motorola says affiliate hijacking of Amazon app was ‘unintended’
summary: Motorola has acknowledged and fixed a behavior in some of its 2026 phones that routed users through a tracking link before opening the Amazon app, characterizing the issue as unintended. The company did not explain how the redirect mechanism was introduced in the first place.
content:
The 2026 Razr Ultra is one of the Motorola phones that exhibited the ‘unintended’ redirects. | Photo: Allison Johnson / The Verge	

Motorola says that recently discovered behavior, which saw some of its phones sending users to an affiliate tracking website before opening the Amazon app, was "unintended" and has been "promptly corrected." The company didn't explain how the error was introduced in the first place.
"Recently, Motorola acted quickly to resolve an issue that was identified, which caused some users in the US launching the Amazon Shopping app to be routed through a web tracking link before opening the app. This behavior was unintended and resulted in an inconsistent user experience," Allison Yi, Motorola's executive director of product management, told The Ver …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 摩托罗拉称Amazon应用关联劫持是"无意的"
zh.summary: 摩托罗拉已确认并修复了其部分2026手机中的一个行为,该行为在打开Amazon应用前通过跟踪链接路由用户,该公司将这个问题描述为无意的。公司没有解释重定向机制最初是如何引入的。

title: Sony is offering up to 50 percent off some of our favorite PS5 games
summary: Sony is hosting a Days of Play sale through June 10th, discounting PS5 games by up to 50 percent alongside hardware and accessories, with titles like Ghost of Yōtei and The Last of Us Part II Remastered hitting all-time lows. The promotion coincides with a State of Play event on June 2nd showcasing the upcoming Wolverine game.
content:
Even without E3, the transition from spring to summer is a busy time for the gaming industry. Summer Game Fest is right around the corner, and Sony is kicking things off with a State of Play on June 2nd with an extended look at Insomniac’s upcoming Wolverine game. To mark the occasion, Sony is also hosting another Days of Play sale, giving you a chance to save on headsets, games, DualSense controllers, earbuds, and other first-party hardware / licensed products through June 10th.
Needless to say, there’s a lot on offer, with Sony’s first-party exclusives being some of the most notable. Right now, for instance, you can pick up the open-world samurai epic that is Ghost of Yōtei at Amazon, Best Buy, and Sony’s PlayStation Direct storefront for an all-time low of $49.99 ($20 off). The Last of Us Part II Remastered ($29.99) and Astro Bot ($39.99) are also discounted for a limited time, the latter of which remains one of the best platforming titles of the last decade.
Below, we’ve rounded up some of our top picks from the ongoing promotion, all of which are on sale for more than 25 percent off.
Ghost of Yōtei

zh.title: 索尼PS5游戏推出五折优惠
zh.summary: 索尼正在举办"游玩日"促销活动（持续至6月10日），PS5游戏最多享五折优惠，硬件和配件也有折扣，包括《对马战鬼》和《最后生还者 第二部分 重制版》等热门游戏均创历史低价。此促销活动与6月2日举行的PlayStation发布会同步进行，将展示即将推出的《金刚狼》游戏。

title: AI coding startup Cognition raises $1B at $25B pre-money valuation
summary: AI coding startup Cognition has secured $1 billion in funding at a $25 billion pre-money valuation, more than doubling its valuation in eight months. The funding comes as the company reports $492 million in annualized revenue run rate.
content: As Cognition reaches $492 million in annualized revenue run rate, it more than doubled its valuation in eight months, it says.

zh.title: AI编程初创公司Cognition融资10亿美元，估值达250亿美元
zh.summary: AI编程初创公司Cognition完成10亿美元融资，融资前估值为250亿美元，在8个月内估值翻倍有余。该公司报告年化收入运行率达4.92亿美元。

title: Sony’s first RGB TV is a statement piece
summary: Sony has entered the RGB LED TV market with the Bravia 7 II and flagship Bravia 9 II, leveraging its superior image processing to compete against both OLED and traditional LED televisions. RGB LED TVs use red, green, and blue backlighting to achieve greater brightness and color than standard LEDs, though at a premium price point.
content:
The first wave of RGB LED TVs are fighting for their spot in the TV hierarchy. They need to outperform OLED TVs in brightness and color (because they'll never match OLED's contrast), and they need to outperform regular LED TVs in everything (because their price is so much higher). It's now time for Sony to take a swing with the Bravia 7 II, which is out alongside the flagship Bravia 9 II. Both pair RGB LED backlighting with Sony's always top-notch processing.
RGB TVs like the Bravia 7 II use red, green, and blue LEDs instead of a field of all-blue or white LEDs for the backlight. This allows for an RGB LED TV to display more, and brighter,  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 索尼首款RGB电视是艺术杰作
zh.summary: 索尼推出了Bravia 7 II和旗舰产品Bravia 9 II两款RGB LED电视，利用其优越的图像处理技术与OLED和传统LED电视竞争。RGB LED电视采用红、绿、蓝三色背光技术，相比标准LED电视能提供更高的亮度和色彩表现，但价格较为昂贵。

title: FAA orders SpaceX to investigate Starship V3 booster failure
summary: The FAA has ordered SpaceX to investigate why the first V3 booster failed during its initial test flight. Starship remains grounded until the investigation is completed.
content: Starship is grounded until SpaceX finds out why the first V3 booster failed during its first test flight.

zh.title: 美国联邦航空局命令SpaceX调查星舰V3助推器失败
zh.summary: 美国联邦航空局已命令SpaceX调查第一个V3助推器在初次试飞中失败的原因。星舰将保持停飞状态，直到调查完成。

title: Nvidia kills Windows XP-era Control Panel "after 20 years of dedicated service"
summary: Nvidia is discontinuing its legacy Control Panel application after 20 years of use, stating that all features have been migrated to the newer Nvidia app.
content: Nvidia says the Control Panel's features have been migrated to the Nvidia app.

zh.title: 英伟达终止运维Windows XP时代的控制面板，已有20年专业服务
zh.summary: 英伟达正在停用其遗留的控制面板应用程序，该应用已服役20年，公司表示所有功能已迁移到新的英伟达应用程序。

title: Volvo gets US government approval to bypass Chinese connected-car ban
summary: Volvo has received US government approval to bypass the Biden-era Chinese connected-car ban for model year 2027 onward, with the exemption maintained under the Trump administration.
content: The ban for model year 2027 onward began under Biden and has been enacted by Trump.

zh.title: 沃尔沃获得美国政府批准，绕过中国互联汽车禁令
zh.summary: 沃尔沃获得美国政府批准，可以在2027年及以后的车型中绕过拜登时代的中国互联汽车禁令，该豁免在特朗普政府下得以保留。

title: Startup Battlefield 200 applications close today: Nominate a founder or submit your startup
summary: TechCrunch's Startup Battlefield 200 application deadline closes today at 11:59 p.m. PT, offering $100,000 in equity-free funding and a pitch opportunity at TechCrunch Disrupt to winning startups. The competition provides global visibility and direct investor access.
content: Today is the final day to apply or nominate a startup for Startup Battlefield 200. Once the clock strikes 11:59 p.m. PT, the window closes on your chance to compete for $100,000 in equity-free funding, gain global visibility, connect directly with investors, and launch on the TechCrunch Disrupt stage.

zh.title: Startup Battlefield 200应用截止日期今日结束：推荐创始人或提交您的初创公司
zh.summary: TechCrunch的Startup Battlefield 200应用截止日期今日下午11:59（太平洋时间），为获胜的初创公司提供10万美元的无股权融资和在TechCrunch Disrupt大会上的演讲机会，该竞赛为参赛者提供全球知名度和直接的投资者接触机会。

title: ElevenLabs’ new music-generation model can switch genres mid-track
summary: ElevenLabs has released a new music generation model that allows users to regenerate sections of a song without affecting the rest of the track, enabling genre switching and modifications within a single composition.
content: ElevenLabs' new model will let users regenerate a section of a song without affecting the rest of the track.

zh.title: ElevenLabs 的新音乐生成模型可以在歌曲中途切换音乐流派
zh.summary: ElevenLabs 发布了一个新的音乐生成模型，允许用户在不影响歌曲其余部分的情况下重新生成歌曲的某些部分，从而能够在单一作品中进行流派切换和修改。

title: Spotify now lets you ‘clip’ moments from your favorite podcast
summary: Spotify has introduced a new scissors icon feature that allows users to clip favorite moments from podcasts and share them with their audience.
content: With the new scissors icon, you can clip favorite moments from podcasts and share them with your audience.

zh.title: Spotify 现在允许你从最喜欢的播客中"剪辑"精彩瞬间
zh.summary: Spotify 推出了一个新的剪刀图标功能，允许用户剪辑播客中喜爱的瞬间并与他们的听众分享。

title: SOND, a sleep tech startup from Bose’s former head of sleep, exits stealth with $7M
summary: SOND, a sleep technology startup founded by Bose's former head of sleep, has raised $7 million and launched Dreambuds, an in-ear system that captures 12 physiological signals and provides real-time interventions to improve sleep quality.
content: SOND introduced its debut product: Dreambuds, a closed-loop, in-ear system that captures 12 physiological signals from the wearer, then acts on them in real time to help consumers get better sleep.

zh.title: SOND——由 Bose 前睡眠负责人创办的睡眠科技初创公司——以 700 万美元融资公开亮相
zh.summary: SOND 是一家由 Bose 前睡眠负责人创办的睡眠技术初创公司，已融资 700 万美元并推出 Dreambuds，这是一个耳内系统，可以捕捉 12 种生理信号并提供实时干预以改善睡眠质量。

title: ClickHouse triples anualized revenue to $250M, charting a path toward an IPO
summary: Database provider ClickHouse has tripled its anualized revenue to $250M and is eyeing a public debut within the next few years, signaling strong enterprise adoption of its analytics platform.
content: The database provider is eyeing a public debut within the next few years.

zh.title: ClickHouse 将年度收入增至 2.5 亿美元，为 IPO 铺平道路
zh.summary: 数据库提供商 ClickHouse 将年化收入增至 2.5 亿美元，并计划在未来几年内上市，表明其分析平台在企业中的应用强劲。

title: YouTube will now automatically label AI videos
summary: YouTube is automatically detecting and labeling videos that use significant photorealistic AI instead of solely relying on creator disclosure, making AI content identification more prominent for viewers.
content: YouTube will now automatically label videos that use significant photorealistic AI, instead of relying solely on creators to disclose AI-generated content themselves. It's also making AI labels more prominent.

zh.title: YouTube 现在将自动标记 AI 视频
zh.summary: YouTube 正在自动检测和标记使用大量逼真 AI 生成内容的视频，而不仅仅依靠创作者披露，使观众更能清晰识别 AI 内容。

title: Win cool gadgets we can’t keep because The Verge has ethics
summary: The Verge is running a monthly giveaway of gadgets from its "Today I'm Toying With" series, as the publication's strict ethics policy prevents journalists from keeping items sent by companies.
content:
When people learn I work for The Verge, they inevitably ask: “Do you get to keep the gadgets?” Now that I film Today I’m Toying With, a video series where I share the joy of tech, I get that question more than ever.
The answer is no, we don’t keep them! Our ethics policy is clear: “We don’t accept things of value from companies or from their PR firms, period.” We don’t keep them, we don’t sell them, we don’t pass them to family or friends. We try to return them, and if a company doesn’t want them back, we give them away. 
But I’ll let you in on a little secret — for over a year, I’ve been quietly asking those companies permission to give those unwanted gadgets to you. 

 
 @verge 
Want to win robot toys, chargers, gaming gear and more? We’re giving away some of the actual gadgets we’ve shared here on TikTok in our Today I’m Toying With giveaway! The Verge’s strong ethics policy means our journalists don’t get to keep the gadgets or anything else a company sends. Usually we return or donate — but since Today I’m Toying With is all about sharing the joy of gadgets, we thought we’d share some actual gadgets, too! You can find the Today I’m Toying With giveaway and official rules at theverge.com/titw — every few weeks, you can submit your name and email address for a chance to win a random prize pack of items we actually called in for the show. #todayimtoyingwith #tech #gadgets #techtok 
 ♬ original sound – The Verge 
  


I originally came up with Today I’m Toying With so you can live vicariously through me, playing with more cool stuff than you can necessarily afford yourself. (I certainly can’t afford a tenth of what I get to try this way!) 
But what if you could actually reach out and touch these gadgets? What if I shipped you actual items you’ve seen in my videos on YouTube and Instagram and TikTok? What if I did it every month or maybe every week?




That’s what we’re going to do. I have dozens of awesome packages of gadgets to give away — Robot toys! USB-C charg

zh.title: 赢得 The Verge 因伦理政策而无法保留的酷炫产品
zh.summary: 由于 The Verge 的严格伦理政策禁止记者保留公司发送的物品，该媒体正在每月进行其"今日把玩"系列产品的赠送活动。

title: The best part of Mina the Hollower is how it randomizes the Zelda formula
summary: Mina the Hollower from Yacht Club Games features a built-in randomizer that shuffles items and enemies, allowing players to experience a Zelda-like adventure in new ways and encouraging immediate replays.
content:
After rolling credits on Mina the Hollower, I did something unusual for me and immediately started a new file. I'm not typically one to replay games right after I beat them. But Mina, a new action-adventure title from Shovel Knight creators Yacht Club Games, offers something that got me to jump right back into a brand-new adventure: a built-in randomizer. 
Randomizers shuffle things like items and enemies so that players can experience games they might be very familiar with in a whole new way. Imagine tackling The Legend of Zelda: Ocarina of Time, but not finding the Kokiri Sword in the chest it's supposed to be in. A randomizer forces play …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Mina the Hollower最出色的地方是它如何随机化塞尔达游戏公式
zh.summary: Yacht Club Games的《Mina the Hollower》内置了一个随机生成器，可以打乱物品和敌人的位置，让玩家能够以全新的方式体验类塞尔达冒险，并促进玩家立即重新开始游戏。

title: YouTube is putting AI labels where you’ll actually see them
summary: YouTube is repositioning AI labels on videos to be more prominent—now appearing directly below the player instead of hidden in descriptions—and will automatically identify AI-generated content platform-wide.
content:
The labels are more prominent, and they actually say “AI” now. | Image: YouTube / The Verge	

In the wake of Google expanding its AI verification efforts at I/O, YouTube is now finally going to start taking AI labeling seriously. YouTube has announced that it's relocating AI disclosures on Shorts and long-form videos to make them easier to spot and will start automatically identifying and labeling AI-generated content on the platform.
For regular YouTube videos, the label - which says "AI" next to a recognizable information symbol - will now appear directly below the video player, above the description. Currently, this information is hidden on the videos themselves and can only be viewed by expanding the video description and checki …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: YouTube把AI标签放在你真正能看到的地方
zh.summary: YouTube正在重新定位视频上的AI标签，使其更加显眼——现在它们出现在播放器下方而不是隐藏在描述中——并将自动识别平台上所有AI生成的内容。

title: The Witcher 3 is getting another expansion, more than a decade after launch
summary: CD Projekt Red announced Songs of the Past, the third expansion for The Witcher 3, launching in 2027 and co-developed with Fool's Theory—more than a decade after the original 2015 release.
content:
The fourth Witcher game may be a ways off, but fans won't be without Geralt of Rivia for long. CD Projekt Red just announced Songs of the Past, the third expansion for The Witcher 3, which will be launching in 2027.
Aside from the title, there aren't many details about the expansion just yet. It's being co-developed by CDPR and fellow Polish studio Fool's Theory. What's most notable about Songs of the Past, though, is the timing: The Witcher 3 first launched in 2015, meaning the latest expansion is coming more than a decade after the game first premiered. The game's first two expansions - Hearts of Stone and Blood and Wine - both launched w …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 《巫师3》在推出十多年后推出新资料片
zh.summary: CD Projekt Red宣布推出《巫师3》的第三个资料片《歌唱过去》，将于2027年推出，由Fool's Theory公司联合开发——距离原作2015年发布已超过十年。

title: Tech CEOs are apparently suffering from AI psychosis
summary: Box CEO Aaron Levie suggests tech executives are uniquely prone to "AI psychosis," reflecting seemingly religious-like beliefs in AI productivity gains that may lack sufficient evidence.
content: "CEOs are uniquely prone to AI psychosis," Box CEO Aaron Levie opines. Maybe that explains the almost religious belief in AI productivity gains.

zh.title: 科技CEO似乎患上了AI妄想症
zh.summary: Box首席执行官Aaron Levie表示，科技高管特别容易患上"AI妄想症"，这反映了他们对AI生产力收益的似乎宗教般的信念，但这些信念可能缺乏充分证据。

title: Robinhood now lets your AI agents trade stocks
summary: Robinhood now allows users to create a separate account with a pre-loaded balance that AI agents can use to autonomously execute stock trades on their behalf.
content: Robinhood will let users create a separate account with pre-loaded balance that an agent use to trade

zh.title: Robinhood现在让你的AI代理交易股票
zh.summary: Robinhood现在允许用户创建一个单独的账户，其中预加载了余额，AI代理可以使用该账户代表用户自主执行股票交易。

title: Xreal’s budget AR glasses feature anti-shake tech and swappable frames
summary: Xreal launched its "X By Xreal" subbrand with the a01 AR glasses starting at $299, featuring an industry-first anti-shake algorithm and customizable, swappable front frames available in July.
content:
Xreal says that a01 wearers can also 3D print their own custom front frame designs. | Image by Xreal	

Augmented reality wearables provider Xreal has launched a new "X By Xreal" (XBX) subbrand, with its first customizable, lightweight smart glasses coming to the US in July. The new a01 AR glasses will be available starting at $299, featuring a "highly stable anti-shake mode" and interchangeable front frames.
While the a01 lacks the degrees-of-freedom (DoF) support we typically see on more premium AR glasses to track the wearer's movements and head rotations, it does include what Xreal is calling the "industry-first spatial anti-shake algorithm." This preserves image clarity by reducing shake during turbulent motions, like when you're riding  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Xreal的经济型AR眼镜搭载防抖技术和可互换镜框
zh.summary: Xreal推出其"X By Xreal"子品牌，a01 AR眼镜起价299美元，具有业界首创的防抖算法和可定制的可互换前框架，将于7月上市。

title: Redmagic’s liquid-cooled gaming phone arrives with overclocked Snapdragon chip
summary: Nubia's Redmagic 11S Pro gaming phone launches with an overclocked Snapdragon 8 Elite Gen 5 chip, 7,500mAh battery, 144Hz display, and visible liquid cooling paired with a high-RPM fan.
content:
Liquid cooling returns and is now visible on every version of the phone.	

Nubia has announced the international launch of the Redmagic 11S Pro, its new flagship Android gaming phone. It's not a significant change from the 11 Pro, which launched internationally last November, but has been upgraded to the overclocked Snapdragon 8 Elite Gen 5 Leading Version.
Otherwise things look similar. There's a large 7,500mAh battery, fast 80W charging, and a 144Hz screen with an under-display camera. The company's AquaCore cooling returns, combining a 24,000 RPM fan with a true liquid cooling system - not the simple vapor chamber found on other phones. The big downside to the 11S Pro is that the RAM caps at 16GB and the storag …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 红魔11S Pro液冷游戏手机搭载超频骁龙芯片上市
zh.summary: 努比亚红魔11S Pro游戏手机配备超频骁龙8 Elite Gen 5芯片、7500mAh电池、144Hz显示屏，并搭配可见液冷和高转速风扇。

title: The AI fight brewing inside The New York Times
summary: New York Times unionized Tech Guild employees are filing unfair labor practice charges, demanding the company disclose its AI usage, future AI plans, and how they will affect worker roles and workflows.
content:
Yellow taxis pass in front of The New York Times newspaper building. | Alexandra Schuler/dpa (Photo by Alexandra Schuler/picture alliance via Getty Images)	

How newsrooms should use AI - or if they should at all - has been a recurrent debate within the media industry over the last several years. Increasingly, these rules are being hammered out at the bargaining table between unions and publishers. Right now, employees at The New York Times are gearing up for a fight.
Unionized staff with the Tech Guild say Times management has refused to provide the union with information related to how the company has used AI, its plans for AI use in the future, and how it will affect employees' jobs and workflow. (The union filed an unfair labor practice charge earlier this month.) The Tech Guild, a NewsGuild …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 《纽约时报》内部酝酿的AI劳资纠纷
zh.summary: 《纽约时报》工会科技分会成员正在提交不公平劳动行为申诉，要求公司披露其AI使用情况、未来AI计划，以及这些计划将如何影响员工角色和工作流程。

title: The new Razr Ultra isn’t your average phone — for better and worse
summary: Motorola's Razr Ultra features premium materials like Alcantara fabric on its back panel in striking colors, offering luxury positioning but raising questions about long-term durability with everyday use.
content:
A fine-looking phone.	

I had one ask for friends, colleagues, the lady checking me in for a meeting at a large software company's headquarters, and everyone else who stopped to admire the phone I've been carrying around.
"Pet it."
The Razr Ultra is not your average phone. I got the orient blue color option to test, which has a soft, woven back panel made of Alcantara fabric - which you're more likely to find on the seats of a fancy car. I can't stop petting it. I'm worried about how it'll look after spending years in and out of dusty tote bags and my kid's grubby hands, but after a couple of weeks of testing it hasn't picked up any gunk or dirt that I haven't be …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 新款Razr Ultra并非普通手机——有好有坏
zh.summary: 摩托罗拉Razr Ultra后盖采用Alcantara等高端材料，提供多种鲜艳色彩，定位奢侈品，但引发了对日常使用中长期耐用性的质疑。

title: The Pope isn’t AGI-pilled
summary: Pope Leo XIV released an encyclical warning that AI use is never purely technical and directly affects human rights and freedoms, announced alongside Anthropic cofounder Christopher Olah in a Church-industry partnership.
content:
On Monday, Pope Leo XIV unveiled an encyclical letter addressing the societal implications of artificial intelligence. The letter, titled Magnifica Humanitas, warned that the "use of AI is never a purely technical matter: when it enters processes that affect people's lives, it touches on rights, opportunities, status and freedom." Alongside him was Anthropic cofounder and interpretability team lead Christopher Olah, representing a partnership between the Catholic Church and one of the biggest players in AI.
The letter elicited a wide range of reactions from in and around the tech industry. Nearly everyone believed the document would be infl …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 教宗并非AGI信徒
zh.summary: 利奥十四世教宗发布通谕，警告人工智能的使用绝非纯技术问题，直接影响人权和自由。该通谕与Anthropic联合创始人克里斯托弗·奥拉共同宣布，体现了教会与产业的合作伙伴关系。

title: Motorola's 2026 Razrs are almost worth buying just for their stunning looks… almost

content: Pretty little phones with pretty big price tags.

title: US law enforcement warns of "anti-tech extremism" as AI hatred grows
summary: US federal law enforcement agencies are raising alarm about a new threat category called "anti-tech extremism" as public sentiment against AI and technology companies grows increasingly hostile.
content: The feds are raising the alarm about a new category of threat.

zh.title: 美国执法部门警告"反科技极端主义"随着AI仇恨加剧

title: Did the Pope use AI to write about the dangers of AI?
summary: It's possible that AI was used to write parts of Pope Leo XIV's latest encyclical about AI's impact on humanity. An analysis by Linch Zhang posted on the forum LessWrong found certain paragraphs of Ma
content:
It's possible that AI was used to write parts of Pope Leo XIV's latest encyclical about AI's impact on humanity. An analysis by Linch Zhang posted on the forum LessWrong found certain paragraphs of Magnifica Humanitas to be between 40 percent and 100 percent written by AI, according to the popular AI detector Pangram.
The document includes known traits that appear in AI-generated writing, such as a higher use of the word "genuinely" - which crops up in writing by Anthropic's Claude - than previous encyclicals, Zhang says. Another person ran the text of the document section by section through Pangram, finding that 62 percent of its first cha …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 教宗是否使用AI来撰写关于AI危害的文章？
